headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://maps.googleapis.com https://maps.gstatic.com https://js.stripe.com https://js.stripe.com/v3/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://maps.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://maps.googleapis.com https://maps.gstatic.com https://*.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://maps.googleapis.com https://places.googleapis.com https://api.stripe.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com; worker-src blob: 'self';
